svg.text: PUB/SUB lz4+tcp: structured JSON, 1 PUB → 32 SUBs (omq-tokio), dict 2K
Linux VM on a 2018 Mac Mini, Intel Core i7-8700B @ 3.20GHz, 6 cores, performance governor, turbo off
dotted = sender CPU % linear (left) · solid = aggregate virtual SUB throughput log (inner right) · dashed = msg/s log (outer right)
